package rulecoverage

func NegativeHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeam() string {
    ruleID := "handler_tests_use_real_database_without_seam"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handler tests that hit real DB setup even though repository or service seams exist."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
